code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./DatabaseTable.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const DatabaseTable=()=>{const[data,setData]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchData=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/database-table');const result=await response.json();setData(result);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching data:',error);}};fetchData();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"database-table-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Database Table"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"database-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Details"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:data.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:item.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:item.details})]},item.id))})]})]});};export default DatabaseTable;
